pageContext.name: Tsunade (Version 2)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Megahouse are proud to present the Tsunade (Version 2) Collectible Figure. This anime figure stands at approximately 6.3 inches high and features the character Tsunade from Naruto and Naruto: Shippuden. Known as the world's greatest kunoichi, despite her often lax and blunt personality, she is also greatly feared for her abilities... and also for how quickly she can dish out punishment when she detects foolishness.  A great addition to any Naruto collection!
